---
title: "Post-column derivatization high-performance liquid chromatography-ultraviolet-ultraviolet (HPLC-UV) method for the detection of Kryptofix 2.2.2 content in Positron Emission Tomography (PET) tracers"
date: 2026-03-01
author:
  - name: Xu, Lei
  - name: Dong, Zhenhao
  - name: Zhang, Hong
  - name: Gomes, Antonio Arleques
  - name: De Rossi, Wagner
  - name: Wang, Jing
  - name: Nario, Arian Pérez
  - name: He, Qinggang
abstract: > 
  Resumo não disponível.
categories: [article]
citation: 
  container-title: "Nuclear Medicine and Biology"
  volume: 154-155
  doi: "10.1016/j.nucmedbio.2026.109610"
---

```{=html}
<nav aria-label="breadcrumb">
  <ol class="breadcrumb">
    <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="../../index.html">Home</a></li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="../index.html">Publicações</a></li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item active" aria-current="page">Post-column derivatization high-performance liquid chromatography-ultraviolet-ultraviolet (HPLC-UV) method for the detection of Kryptofix 2.2.2 content in Positron Emission Tomography (PET) tracers</li>
  </ol>
</nav>
